rules.description: Migrate all workloads from Linux Consumption to Flex Consumption to maintain access to new features and avoid service disruptions.
rules.query: where ['kind'] =~ 'functionapp,linux' | extend sku = parse_json(properties).sku | where sku =~ 'Dynamic'
rules.fix: Migrate all workloads from Linux Consumption to Flex Consumption to maintain access to new features and avoid service disruptions.

rules.description: Extended support for Node 18 LTS is ending. Apps hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates are no longer available. The platform no longer provides customer service for Node 18 LTS.
rules.fix: Extended support for Node 18 LTS is ending. Apps hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates are no longer available. The platform no longer provides customer service for Node 18 LTS.

rules.description: After the retirement date, unless migrated to sidecar containers, Docker Compose applications face disruptions resulting in errors for HTTP status code of 5xx.
rules.query: extend Version=properties.siteProperties.properties | mv-expand Version | extend VersionName=tostring(Version.name), Versionvalue=tostring(Version.value) | where VersionName=='LinuxFxVersion' | where Versionvalue in ('COMPOSE')
rules.fix: After the retirement date, unless migrated to sidecar containers, Docker Compose applications face disruptions resulting in errors for HTTP status code of 5xx.

rules.description: Extended support for PHP 8.2 is ending. Apps hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates are no longer available. The platform no longer provides customer service for PHP 8.2.
rules.fix: Extended support for PHP 8.2 is ending. Apps hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates are no longer available. The platform no longer provides customer service for PHP 8.2.

rules.description: Extended support for Python 3.9 is retiring. Apps that are hosted on App Service will continue to run, but security updates and customer support will no longer be available
rules.fix: Extended support for Python 3.9 is retiring. Apps that are hosted on App Service will continue to run, but security updates and customer support will no longer be available

rules.description: Extended support for PHP 8.1 is ending. Apps hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates aren't available. The platform no longer provides customer service for PHP 8.1.
rules.fix: Extended support for PHP 8.1 is ending. Apps hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates aren't available. The platform no longer provides customer service for PHP 8.1.

rules.description: Extended support for Node 20 LTS is ending. The apps hosted on App Service continue to run; but security updates are no longer available and the platform no longer provides customer service for Node 20 LTS.
rules.query: where ['kind'] !contains 'functionapp' | extend Version=properties.siteProperties.properties | mv-expand Version | extend VersionName=tostring(Version.name), Versionvalue=tostring(Version.value) | where VersionName=='LinuxFxVersion' | where Versionvalue in ('NODE|20-lts')
rules.fix: Extended support for Node 20 LTS is ending. The apps hosted on App Service continue to run; but security updates are no longer available and the platform no longer provides customer service for Node 20 LTS.

rules.description: Applications hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates and customer service for .NET 9 (STS) aren't available.
rules.query: where ['kind'] !contains 'functionapp' | extend Version=properties.siteProperties.properties | mv-expand Version | extend VersionName=tostring(Version.name), Versionvalue=tostring(Version.value) | where VersionName=='LinuxFxVersion' | where Versionvalue in ('DOTNETCORE|9.0')
rules.fix: Applications hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates and customer service for .NET 9 (STS) aren't available.

rules.description: Extended support for Python 3.9 is ending. Apps hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates are no longer available. The platform no longer provides customer service for Python 3.9.
rules.fix: Extended support for Python 3.9 is ending. Apps hosted on App Service continue to run. Future security updates are no longer available. The platform no longer provides customer service for Python 3.9.
